findings.location: s1 вҖ” property table, dataWatchInterval row
findings.description: The knowledge file specifies `dataWatchInterval` as type `long` in the property table, but the source file contains no such type information. The source only has an XML comment `<!-- гғҮгғјгӮҝзӣЈиҰ–й–“йҡ”(ms) -->` and an example value `3600000`. The data type `long` has no basis in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source XML: `<property name="dataWatchInterval" value="3600000" />` with comment `<!-- гғҮгғјгӮҝзӣЈиҰ–й–“йҡ”(ms) -->`. No type declaration anywhere in the source.

findings.description: The knowledge file introduces a formal property table with columns еһӢ/еҝ…й Ҳ/гғҮгғ•гӮ©гғ«гғҲеҖӨ/иӘ¬жҳҺ for `dataWatchInterval`. The source contains no such table; only the XML attribute and its inline comment exist. The еҝ…й Ҳ and гғҮгғ•гӮ©гғ«гғҲеҖӨ columns are left empty (implying optional with no default), but neither claim is supported by the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains only the XML snippet and inline comment. No property specification table exists in the source.
